arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola and Erling Haaland's verdict on 115 Man City charges as huge hint dropped
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola and Erling Haaland have spoken out amid the uncertainty surrounding Manchester City as they await the verdict on the 115 charges related to breaches of Premier League rules

arts.ttl: Leyton Orient stun Man City with incredible goal in the FA Cup as Jamie Donley's effort from 40 yards out hits the crossbar and goes in off Stefan Ortega
arts.sum: Leyton Orient stunned Manchester City with a stunning goal from distance in the FA Cup fourth round. Jamie Donley went for goal for Orient from 40 yards out.

arts.ttl: Man City suffer major blow as £50m Nico Gonzalez suffers injury 20 minutes into debut
arts.sum: Nico Gonzalez was handed his first Manchester City start as Pep Guardiola's team faced Leyton Orient in the FA Cup but the former Porto star was forced off early on

arts.ttl: Watch: Man City concede freak own goal to Leyton Orient as on-loan Tottenham man threatens FA Cup shock
arts.sum: Manchester City fall behind to Leyton Orient in their FA Cup fourth-round showdown owing to a freak Stefan Ortega own goal from Jamie Donley's long-range strike.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Leyton Orient host Manchester City in the FA Cup fourth round
arts.sum: League One side Leyton Orient host Premier Leaue giants Manchester City in the FA Cup fourth round. ESPN has live updates.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou responds after Leyton Orient boss Richie Wellens' apology for injuries jibe at Tottenham
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has hit back at Leyton Orient manager Richie Wellens after he made a jibe towards the Tottenham boss last Saturday.

arts.ttl: The Treble to the periphery - what's going on with Jack Grealish?
arts.sum: After the highs of winning the Treble, Jack Grealish has fallen out of favour at Manchester City - but what has gone wrong?

arts.ttl: Leyton Orient vs Manchester City - FA Cup: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola's men bid to avoid huge upset after heavy defeat at Arsenal
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the fourth round FA Cup tie between Leyton Orient and Manchester City as the Cityzens seek to avoid a huge upset at Brisbane Road.

arts.ttl: Leyton Orient vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Manchester City are aiming to put last weekend's humiliation behind them when they visit Leyton Orient in the FA Cup fourth round on Saturday. With a gargantuan Champions League play-off first leg clash with Real Madrid to come on Tuesday evening, Pep Guardiola is likely to make sweeping alterations to his side against Leyton Orient.

arts.ttl: Leyton Orient vs Man City – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: League One promotion chasers Leyton Orient host Man City in the FA Cup fourth round on Saturday afternoon. Orient progressed into the last 32 of the prestigious competition by knocking out Derby County viaa penalty shootout in the previous.
